verse.verse_3: La‘allaka bākhi‘un nafsaka allā yakūnū mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_4: In nasya' nunazzil ‘alaihim minas-samā'i āyatan fa ẓallat a‘nāquhum lahā khāḍi‘īn(a).
verse.verse_5: Wa mā ya'tīhim min żikrim minar-raḥmāni muḥdaṡin illā kānū ‘anhu mu‘riḍīn(a).
verse.verse_6: Faqad każżabū fa saya'tīhim ambā'u mā kānū bihī yastahzi'ūn(a).
verse.verse_7: Awalam yarau ilal-arḍi kam ambatnā fīhā min kulli zaujin karīm(in).
verse.verse_8: Inna fī żālika la'āyah(tan), wa mā kāna akṡaruhum mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_10: Wa iż nādā rabbuka mūsā ani'til-qaumaẓ-ẓālimīn(a).
verse.verse_12: Qāla rabbi innī akhāfu ay yukażżibūn(i).
verse.verse_13: Wa yaḍīqu ṣadrī wa lā yanṭaliqu lisānī fa arsil ilā hārūn(a).
verse.verse_14: Wa lahum ‘alayya żambun fa akhāfu ay yaqtulūn(i).
verse.verse_15: Qāla kallā, fażhabā bi'āyātinā innā ma‘akum mustami‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_16: Fa'tiyā fir‘auna faqūlā innā rasūlu rabbil-‘ālamīn(a).
verse.verse_18: Qāla alam nurabbika fīnā walīdaw wa labiṡta fīnā min ‘umurika sinīn(a).
verse.verse_19: Wa fa‘alta fa‘latakal-latī fa‘alta wa anta minal-kāfirīn(a).
verse.verse_20: Qāla fa‘altuhā iżaw wa ana minaḍ-ḍāllīn(a).
verse.verse_21: Fa farartu minkum lammā khiftukum fa wahaba lī rabbī ḥukmaw wa ja‘alanī minal-mursalīn(a).
verse.verse_22: Wa tilka ni‘matun tamunnuhā ‘alayya an ‘abbatta banī isrā'īl(a).
verse.verse_24: Qāla rabbus-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa mā bainahumā, in kuntum mūqinīn(a).
verse.verse_27: Qāla inna rasūlakumul-lażī ursila ilaikum lamajnūn(un).
verse.verse_28: Qāla rabbul-masyriqi wal-magribi wa mā bainahumā, in kuntum ta‘qilūn(a).
verse.verse_29: Qāla la'inittakhażta ilāhan gairī la'aj‘alannaka minal-masjūnīn(a).
verse.verse_31: Qāla fa'ti bihī in kunta minaṣ-ṣādiqīn(a).
verse.verse_32: Fa alqā ‘aṣāhu fa iżā hiya ṡu‘bānum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_33: Wa naza‘a yadahū fa iżā hiya baiḍā'u lin-nāẓirīn(a).
verse.verse_34: Qāla lil-mala'i ḥaulahū inna hāżā lasāḥirun ‘alīm(un).
verse.verse_35: Yurīdu ay yukhrijakum min arḍikum bisiḥrih(ī), fa māżā ta'murūn(a).
verse.verse_36: Qālū arjih wa akhāhu wab‘aṡ fil-madā'ini ḥāsyirīn(a).
verse.verse_39: Wa qīla lin-nāsi hal antum mujtami‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_41: Falammā jā'as-saḥaratu qālū lifir‘auna a'inna lanā la'ajran in kunnā naḥnul-gālibīn(a).
verse.verse_42: Qāla na‘am wa innakum iżal laminal-muqarrabīn(a).
verse.verse_43: Qāla lahum mūsā alqū mā antum mulqūn(a).
verse.verse_44: Fa alqau ḥibālahum wa ‘iṣiyyahum wa qālū bi‘izzati fir‘auna innā lanaḥnul-gālibūn(a).
verse.verse_45: Fa alqā mūsā ‘aṣāhu fa iżā hiya talqafu mā ya'fikūn(a).
verse.verse_49: Qāla āmantum lahū qabla an āżana lakum, innahū lakabīrukumul-lażī ‘allamakumus-siḥr(a), fa lasaufa ta‘lamūn(a), la'uqaṭṭi‘anna aidiyakum wa arjulakum min khilāfiw wa la'uṣallibannakum  ajma'īn(a).
verse.verse_50: Qālū lā ḍair(a), innā ilā rabbinā munqalibūn(a).
verse.verse_51: Innā naṭma‘u ay yagfira lanā rabbunā khaṭāyānā an kunnā awwalal-mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_52: Wa auḥainā ilā mūsā an asri bi‘ibādī innakum muttaba‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_61: Falammā tarā'al-jam‘āni qāla aṣḥābu mūsā innā lamudrakūn(a).
verse.verse_62: Qāla kallā, inna ma‘iya rabbī sayahdīn(i).
verse.verse_63: Fa auḥainā ilā mūsā aniḍrib bi‘aṣākal-baḥr(a), fanfalaqa fa kāna kullu firqin kaṭ-ṭaudil ‘aẓīm(i).
verse.verse_65: Wa anjainā mūsā wa mam ma‘ahū ajma‘īn(a).
verse.verse_67: Inna fī żālika la'āyah(tan), wa mā kāna akṡaruhum mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_70: Iż qāla li'abīhi wa qaumihī mā ta‘budūn(a).
verse.verse_71: Qālū na‘budu aṣnāman fa naẓallu lahā ‘ākifīn(a).
verse.verse_74: Qālū bal wajadnā ābā'anā każālika yaf‘alūn(a).
verse.verse_75: Qāla afa ra'aitum mā kuntum ta‘budūn(a).
verse.verse_80: Wa iżā mariḍtu fa huwa yasyfīn(i).
verse.verse_82: Wal-lażī aṭma‘u ay yagfira lī khaṭī'atī yaumad-dīn(i).
verse.verse_83: Rabbi hab lī ḥukmaw wa alḥiqnī biṣ-ṣāliḥīn(a).
verse.verse_88: Yauma lā yanfa‘u māluw wa lā banūn(a).
verse.verse_92: Wa qīla lahum ainamā kuntum ta‘budūn(a).
verse.verse_93: Min dūnillāh(i), hal  yanṣurūnakum au yantaṣirūn(a).
verse.verse_97: Tallāhi in kunnā lafī ḍalālim mubīn(in).
verse.verse_102: Falau anna lanā karratan fa nakūna minal-mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_103: Inna fī żālika la'āyah(tan), wa mā kāna akṡaruhum mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_106: Iż qāla lahum akhūhum nūḥun alā tattaqūn(a).
verse.verse_109: Wa mā as'alukum ‘alaihi min ajr(in), in ajriya illā ‘alā rabbil-‘ālamīn(a).
verse.verse_112: Qāla wa mā ‘ilmī bimā kānū ya‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_113: In ḥisābuhum illā ‘alā rabbī lau tasy‘urūn(a).
verse.verse_116: Qālū la'illam tantahi yā nūḥu latakūnanna minal-marjūmīn(a).
verse.verse_118: Faftaḥ bainī wa bainahum fatḥaw wa najjinī wa mam ma‘iya minal-mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_119: Fa anjaināhu wa mam ma‘ahū fil-fulkil-masyḥūn(i).
verse.verse_121: Inna fī żālika la'āyah(tan), wa mā kāna akṡaruhum mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_124: Iż qāla lahum akhūhum hūdun alā tattaqūn(a).
verse.verse_127: Wa mā as'alukum ‘alaihi min ajr(in), in ajriya illā ‘alā rabbil-‘ālamīn(a).
verse.verse_136: Qālū sawā'un ‘alainā awa‘aẓta am lam takum minal-wā‘iẓīn(a).
verse.verse_139: Fa każżabūhu fa ahlaknāhum, inna fī żālika la'āyah(tan),  wa mā kāna akṡaruhum mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_142: Iż qāla lahum akhūhum ṣāliḥun alā tattaqūn(a).
verse.verse_145: Wa mā as'alukum ‘alaihi min ajr(in), in ajriya illā ‘alā rabbil-‘ālamīn(a).
verse.verse_148: Wa zurū‘iw wa nakhlin ṭal‘uhā haḍīm(un).
verse.verse_152: Allażīna yufsidūna fil-arḍi wa lā yaṣliḥūn(a).
verse.verse_154: Mā anta illā basyarum miṡlunā, fa'ti bi'āyatin in kunta minaṣ-ṣādiqīn(a).
verse.verse_155: Qāla hāżihī nāqatul lahā syirbuw wa lakum syirbu yaumim ma‘lūm(in).
verse.verse_156: Wa lā tamassūhā bisū'in fa ya'khużakum ‘ażābu yaumin ‘aẓīm(in).
verse.verse_158: Fa akhażahumul-‘ażāb(u), inna fī żālika la'āyah(tan), wa mā kāna akṡaruhum mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_161: Iż qāla lahum akhūhum lūṭun alā tattaqūn(a).
verse.verse_164: Wa mā as'alukum ‘alaihi min ajrin in ajriya illā ‘alā rabbil-‘ālamīn(a).
verse.verse_166: Wa tażarūna mā khalaqa lakum rabbukum min azwājikum, bal antum qamun ‘ādūn(a).
verse.verse_167: Qālū la'illam tantahi yā lūṭu latakūnanna minal-mukhrajīn(a).
verse.verse_169: Rabbi najjinī wa ahlī mimmā ya‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_173: Wa amṭarnā ‘alaihim maṭarā(n), fa sā'a maṭarul-munżarīn(a).
verse.verse_174: Inna fī żālika la'āyah(tan),  wa mā kāna akṡaruhum mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_177: Iż qāla lahum syu‘aibun alā tattaqūn(a).
verse.verse_180: Wa mā as'alukum ‘alaihi min ajrin in ajriya illā ‘alā rabbil-‘ālamīn(a).
verse.verse_183: Wa lā tabkhasun-nāsa asy-yā'ahum wa lā ta‘ṡau fil-arḍi mufsidīn(a).
verse.verse_186: Wa mā anta illā basyarum miṡlunā wa in naẓunnuka laminal-kāżibīn(a).
verse.verse_187: Fa asqiṭ ‘alainā kisafam minas-samā'i in kunta minaṣ-ṣādiqīn(a).
verse.verse_189: Fa każżabūhu fa akhażahum ‘ażābu yaumiẓ-ẓullah(ti), innahū kāna ‘ażāba yaumin ‘aẓīm(in).
verse.verse_190: Inna fī żālika la'āyah(tan),  wa mā kāna akṡaruhum mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_197: Awalam yakul lahum āyatan ay ya‘lamahū ‘ulamā'u banī isrā'īl(a).
verse.verse_199: Fa qara'ahū ‘alaihim mā kānū bihī mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_202: Fa ya'tiyahum bagtataw wa hum lā yasy‘urūn(a).
verse.verse_208: Wa mā ahlaknā min qaryatin illā lahā munżirūn(a).
verse.verse_211: Wa mā yambagī lahum wa mā yastaṭī‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_213: Falā tad‘u ma‘allāhi ilāhan ākhara fa takūna minal-mu‘ażżabīn(a).
verse.verse_216: Fa in ‘aṣauka faqul innī barī'um mimmā ta‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_225: Alam tara annahum fī kulli wādiy yahīmūn(a).
verse.verse_226: Wa annahum yaqūlūna mā lā yaf‘alūn(a).
verse.verse_227: Illal-lażīna āmanū wa ‘amiluṣ-ṣāliḥāti wa żakarullāha kaṡīraw wantaṣarū mim ba‘di mā ẓulimū, wa saya‘lamul-lażīna ẓalamū ayya munqalabiy yanqalibūn(a).
